steps.title: Cancel y and solve for x
steps.content:
The $2y$ and $-2y$ cancel:
$$2x=10$$
$$x=5$$

This is faster than solving for both variables because the question only asks for $x$, and elimination removes $y$ immediately.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $x=5$, which matches Choice B — $5$. Therefore B is correct.
